features.name: priority case statement
features.description: Code should include a priority case statement which ensures exhaustive case coverage and implies priority encoding

features.name: unique case statement
features.description: Code should include a unique case statement which requires all case items to be covered uniquely with no overlapping

features.name: unique0 case statement
features.description: Code should include a unique0 case statement which allows overlapping case items but requires unique coverage when hit
